description_long: This is a medium-sized utility knife featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with ergonomic contours and a visible black grip section. The blade is single-edged, straight, and tapers to a sharp point, with a distinctive set of large, rounded serrations along the lower half of the cutting edge. The blade has a dark, weathered finish, suggesting it is made from high-carbon or stainless steel, and the handle is fastened with visible rivets. There is a small lanyard hole at the end of the handle, and the overall design is utilitarian, suitable for both kitchen and outdoor use. The knife lacks any visible guard between the blade and handle, and there are no decorative engravings or embellishments. The object is compact and appears well-balanced for handheld use.
description: A medium-sized utility knife with a dark, serrated steel blade and a contoured wooden handle with a black grip section.
description_view_0: The knife is seen from the tip, showing the narrow blade and the rounded wooden handle aligned behind it.
description_view_1: The full side profile reveals the straight, pointed blade with large serrations and the ergonomic wooden handle with a black grip.
description_view_2: Viewed from the handle end, the rounded pommel and the alignment of the blade with the handle are visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile shows the same blade and handle features, including the lanyard hole and rivets.
attribute_handle_design: contoured wooden handle with black grip section, rounded pommel, ergonomic shape
